compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

Properties.Description: get news & execute all prompts
start the analysis over stocks insights
Fetches news data for a given country and date range
Term, category and sector analysis
Generate the stocks from insights.
Fetch the URLs from the raw data.
get news & execute all prompts
start the analysis over stocks insights
Fetches news data for a given country and date range
Term, category and sector analysis
Generate the stocks from insights.
Fetch the URLs from the raw data.

D:\\TMZ\\PreMarketStockPrediction\\PreSt.serviceRawFile:
service: SP-Node-Lambda-Functions
provider:
  name: aws
  region: ap-south-1
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  timeout: 30
  environment:
    JWT_SECRET: "iamworkinginheliosassoftwareengineer"
    CountryTable: Country
    TokenHistoryTable: TokenHistory
    CategoryTable: StockCategory
    StockTermTable: StockTerms
    UserCFTable: UserCF
    NewsTable: NewsRawData
    FilteredNews: FilteredNews
    SectorDetailsTable: SectorDetails
    UrlExtractionTable: UrlExtraction
    DeepStockAnalysis: DeepStocksAnalysis
    #Lambdas

  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:Scan
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:Query
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:UpdateItem
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:332717545786:table/*
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - lambda:InvokeFunction
          Resource: "*"
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - aws-marketplace:ViewSubscriptions
            - aws-marketplace:Subscribe
          Resource: "*"
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - bedrock:InvokeModel
          Resource: "*"

plugins:
  - serverless-offline

functions:
  getCountries:
    handler: handlers/country.get
    events:
      - http:
          path: countries
          method: get

  postToken:
    handler: Common/auth.tokengeneration
    events:
      - http:
          path: tokengeneration
          method: put

  getStockTerms:
    handler: handlers/stockTerm.get
    events:
      - http:
          path: stockterms
          method: get

  getStockCategory:
    handler: handlers/stockCategory.get
    events:
      - http:
          path: stockcategory
          method: get

  userFlow:
    handler: handlers/userFlow.get
    events:
      - http:
          path: userflow
          method: put
 
  getCountry:
    handler: handlers/country.getCountry
    events:
      - http:
          path: country
          method: get

  showTermAnalysis:
    handler: handlers/getAnalysis.showTermAnalysis
    events:
      - http:
          path: showtermanalysis
          method: get

  showCategoryAnalysis:
    handler: handlers/getAnalysis.showCategoryAnalysis
    events:
      - http:
          path: showcategoryanalysis
          method: get

  showSectorAnalysis:
    handler: handlers/getAnalysis.showSectorAnalysis
    events:
      - http:
          path: showsectoranalysis
          method: get

  showStockAnalysis:
    handler: handlers/getAnalysis.showStockAnalysis
    events:
      - http:
          path: showstockanalysis
          method: get
  
############# Externl Calls ##############

  callMain:
    handler: External/main.main
    timeout: 600
    description: "get news & execute all prompts"
    events:
      - http:
          path: executeMarketAnalysis
          method: get

  executeDeepStockAnalysis:
    handler: External/stocksDeepAnalysis.get
    timeout: 600
    description: "start the analysis over stocks insights"
    events:
      - http:
          path: deepStockAnalysis
          method: get

############# Externl Calls ##############
  getNews:
    handler: External/newsAnalysis.get
    timeout: 600
    description: "Fetches news data for a given country and date range"    

  getmarketAnalysis:
    handler: External/marketAnalysis.getAnalysis
    timeout: 300
    description: "Term, category and sector analysis"

  getstocksAnalysis:
    handler: External/stocksAnalysis.getStockAnalysis
    timeout: 300
    description: "Generate the stocks from insights."

  geturlExtraction:
    handler: External/urlExtraction.urlExtraction
    timeout: 300
    description: "Fetch the URLs from the raw data."
